zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Timbrell於1572年出生在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，她的父親Thomas Timbrell32歲，母親Alice Mary Aitkins19歲。她於1596年7月6日與John Washborne在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1625年9月29日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年53歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克聖 比特也斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Timbrell于1572年出生在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯时，她的父亲Thomas Timbrell32岁，母亲Alice Mary Aitkins19岁。她于1596年7月6日与John Washborne在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1625年9月29日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年53岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克聖 比特也斯。

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Timbrell was born in 1572, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, her father, Thomas Timbrell, was 32 and her mother, Alice Mary Aitkins, was 19. She married John Washborne on 6 July 1596, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 29 September 1625, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in St Peter's, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Timbrell est née en 1572, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Timbrell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Mary Aitkins, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Washborne le 6 juillet 1596, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1625, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Martha Timbrell 1572 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Timbrell 32 und ihre Mutter Alice Mary Aitkins 19. Sie hat am 6. Juli 1596 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England John Washborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. September 1625 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Peter's, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Timbrell è nata il nel 1572 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas Timbrell, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice Mary Aitkins, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Washborne il 6 luglio 1596, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1625, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a St Peter's, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Timbrellが1572年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Timbrellは32歳，母Alice Mary Aitkinsは19歳であった。1596年7月6日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスでJohn Washborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1625年9月29日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで53歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクスト ペテル'スにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Timbrell(이)가 1572년 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Timbrell(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Mary Aitkins(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1596년 7월 6일 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 John Washborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 스트 피터'스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Timbrell nasceu em 1572, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Timbrell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Mary Aitkins, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Washborne em 6 de julho de 1596, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1625, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Timbrell родилась в 1572 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Timbrell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Mary Aitkins, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Washborne 6 июля 1596 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 29 сентября 1625 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Timbrell nació en 1572, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Timbrell, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Mary Aitkins, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Washborne el 6 de julio de 1596, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1625, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en St Peter's, County Cork, Irlanda.
